title: Intense Yeasty Southern Thai Callaloo One-Pot Wrap
description: A keto-friendly Southern Thai dish featuring callaloo, cheesy yeasty goodness, and a convenient one-pot cooking method, all wrapped up in a crispy ssam-wrap.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven or pot, heat the coconut oil over medium-high heat.
S�eat the Thai red curry paste for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the chopped bok choy and cook until wilted.
Add the callaloo and cook until slightly wilted.
Add the rice vinegar, fish sauce, palm sugar, and monk fruit sweetener. Stir to combine.
Add the cottage cheese and stir until melted and creamy.
Add the cooked ground pork and chopped Thai basil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Warm the ssam-wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the callaloo mixture onto the warmed wraps, followed by a sprinkle of shredded cheese.
